enum: None of the above (e.g. not mentioned, patient does not have an allergy or adverse drug event related to this medication, etc)

ibd_medication_start_date.description: What was the date of the first IBD medication dose? Use YYYY-MM-DD format in your response. Annotations MUST include day, month, and year (e.g. 01/15/2021). If you have Month or Year level precision, your annotation should take the form of the first possible date consistent with that annotation.
ibd_medication_start_date.title: Ibd Medication Start Date

anti_tnf_start_date.description: What was the date of the first anti-TNF medication dose? Use YYYY-MM-DD format in your response. Annotations MUST include day, month, and year (e.g. 01/15/2021). If you have Month or Year level precision, your annotation should take the form of the first possible date consistent with that annotation.
anti_tnf_start_date.title: Anti Tnf Start Date

description:
An object-model for annotations of irritable bowel disorder observations 
found in a patient's chart, related to their treatments and associated findings.
Take care to avoid false positives, like confusing information that only
appears in family history for patient history. Annotations should indicate 
the relevant details of the finding, as well as some additional evidence
metadata to validate findings post-hoc.

rx_class_mentions.description: A list of mentions of which IBD medication class(es) the patient is taking currently.
rx_class_mentions.title: Rx Class Mentions

title: IbdTreatmentAnnotations
